name: Hana's Lazy Meals
overview: The story is about the daily life of a 30-year-old new wife, Hana, who cooks “Zubora Meshi”, while her husband is on a job transfer away from home. ”Zubora-Meshi” is the corner-cutting and easy cooking people usually cook only for themselves to eat.

trailers.title: ドラマ『花のズボラ飯』#1〜6ダイジェスト
